name: STLIX Route Servers
notes:
### How to participate?
Please visit http://stlix.net and click the application up top or email peering@stlix.net to connect.

1/10/40/100 Gb ports available in all sites 

### Max Prefix Settings
Recommended limits to allow for future growth  
IPv4: 200000  
IPv6: 100000  

### Route Server Communities:
0:$peerasn to exclude your routes to $peerasn
46389:$peerasn to include your routes to $peerasn
0:46389 to exclude your routes from all peers

### Official STLIX Extensions:
Kansas City via KCIX - http://kcix.net  
https://www.peeringdb.com/ix/249

Houston via HOUIX - http://houix.net
https://www.peeringdb.com/ix/2835

### Mailing List:
Please email info@stlix.net if you wish to be subscribed to the STLIX members mailing list.
